title: Wisdom Spinbrush Whitening for Powerful Cleaning and Stain Removal, Pack of 5
features: Whitening filaments for increased stain removal
Powerful oscillating cleaning action provides effective plaque removal
Can be use twice a day for 2 minutes for whiter teeth and a healthy smile
Small head to make reaching the back teeth easier
Handle designs to make brushing more fun
description: Wisdom Spinbrush Whitening has been specially designed to provide powerful cleaning and stain removal. The whitening filaments help to remove surface stains for whiter teeth, whilst the powerful oscillating cleaning action provides effective plaque removal.
